author: @sweetfingersmusic

text: Copywriting is too much of a creative process to be replaced by AI. AI is good in math, logic in something has determined rules and boundaries, its good in non-divergent thinking. And you need the complete opposite for copywriting.
author: @SuperLari1234

text: I create grand slam $100M offers and sales copies for different types of businesses on Fiverr using AI. Still, the irony is that local business owners dont understand the value of copy written with AI. And thats right they cant judge if it is a good copy or not. and give bad reviews saying the writer is using AI. Meanwhile, online business owners are totally the opposite.
author: @hashamshafqat

text: AI Sounds robotic always when i try to use it for some Sabri Subi Mails level of copywriting ... & i only reached his style when i tried to talk about my own experiences, thoughts going trough those hardships that i created a product to solve those exact problems i faced .. AI will never beat human creativity in my opinion
author: @yamix.brands

text: This is fantastic. The only issue I have is a lot of clients want human content because they want to know the freelancer actually did some work and didnt just use AI. Also, human content ranks higher on Google. Can you create a video on how you transform AI content to bypass AI detection software. Personally, I find this takes a lot of time, and because youre constantly moving words around the quality also tends to suffer.
author: @Siacourage

text: At best AI will be like a hammer. Its not just gonna build an entire house for you. Until I see it, I truly dont buy into any notion that AI will take over.
author: @highsol222

text: You need a soul to be a good writer. Human creativity will never, ever be annexed by a computer.

text: When aeroplanes are smart enough to fly themselves, all youll need in the cockpit is a man and a dog. The man to make sure the computers are working properly, and the dog to make sure the man doesnt fall asleep.

text: I just prefer to not use AI on principle. Does it yield higher leverage in terms of speed, sure. Does that automatically mean it creates better copy? No.
